assertions.description: The CJMCU-925x board has two I2C sensor ICs (U1=MPU-9250, U2=BMP280) with explicit SDA and SCL net names, and 4.7k pull-up resistors R2 and R4. This is a textbook I2C bus configuration, but no i2c_bus or pull_up_resistor detector fired. The lib_id for the ICs is 'Sensor_Motion:MPU-9250' and 'Sensor_Pressure:BMP280', both well-known I2C devices. The +3.3V power rail is also present but no voltage_regulator or power_supply detector fired.
